name: logistics fleet managers processing 5–15 vehicles/month tool
description: For logistics fleet managers processing 5–15 vehicles/month, overdue inspections cause compliance issues and potential fines. We monitor inspection logs and flag overdue checks instead of manual tracking of inspection logs.
problem_solved: Overdue vehicle inspections leading to compliance issues and potential fines.
